required_skill_areas.networking: 8+ years of experience in network engineering with a heavy focus on large-scale data center deployments
required_skill_areas.physical_infrastructure: Mastery of Physical Layer Standards: Expert knowledge of structured cabling (SMF/MMF, MPO/MTP), optical transceivers (400G/800G), and data center power/cooling requirements.
required_skill_areas.automation: automate the staging and configuration of network devices

evidence.primary_role_motion: deployment, management, advanced diagnosis, maintenance, and repair of high-performance networks for GPU compute clusters
evidence.deployment_environment: Manage a lab environment consisting of the latest GPU systems and networking devices.
evidence.target_customer_industry: support cutting-edge network infrastructure to support the latest NVIDIA and AMD GPUs
evidence.solution_customization_level: Use Python, Ansible, and ZTP (Zero Touch Provisioning) to automate the staging and configuration of network devices.
